identity.name: ITDR — MFA Fatigue / Push-Bombing (Okta)
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-ITDR-002. Plane: ITDR. Primary technique: T1621. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-ITDR-002. Plane: ITDR. Primary technique: T1621. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-ITDR-002.
UC: MFA Fatigue Detection / TC: User Receives N MFA Pushes In <60s Then Approves.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-ITDR-002 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Pre-flight: confirm mfa_fatigue pattern is supported
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli describe idp_signin_emulator \
  | jq -e '.params_schema.properties.event_pattern.description | test("mfa_fatigue")'
# step-2: Burst of 8 push attempts ending in approval — Okta shape
: "${COLLECTOR_URL:=https://collector.cortexsim-canary.invalid/idp/events}"
: "${COLLECTOR_HOST:=collector.cortexsim-canary.invalid}"
cat > /tmp/itdr-002.yml <<YML
campaign_id: CMP-ITDR-002
name: "ITDR — Okta MFA fatigue"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - "$COLLECTOR_HOST"
dry_run: false
tags: [itdr, okta, mfa-fatigue]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: idp_signin_emulator
    params:
      collector_url: "$COLLECTOR_URL"
      provider: okta
      event_pattern: mfa_fatigue
      target_user: "alice.singh@cortexsim-canary.invalid"
      iterations: 1
      burst_count: 8
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/itdr-002.yml --live
# step-3: Heavier burst (16 attempts) to confirm threshold sensitivity
: "${COLLECTOR_URL:=https://collector.cortexsim-canary.invalid/idp/events}"
: "${COLLECTOR_HOST:=collector.cortexsim-canary.invalid}"
cat > /tmp/itdr-002-heavy.yml <<YML
campaign_id: CMP-ITDR-002
name: "ITDR — Okta MFA fatigue heavy"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - "$COLLECTOR_HOST"
dry_run: false
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: idp_signin_emulator
    params:
      collector_url: "$COLLECTOR_URL"
      provider: okta
      event_pattern: mfa_fatigue
      target_user: "alice.singh@cortexsim-canary.invalid"
      iterations: 1
      burst_count: 16
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/itdr-002-heavy.yml --live
